notes: Merged .opencode/tool/read_messages.ts features into built-in packages/opencode/src/tool/read-messages.ts. Added: session_id, sender, kind (alias for type), wave, since, until, unread_only filter params; heartbeat registration to session's own message file; read-state tracking in .read_state.json. Updated description file. Backward compatible — existing type parameter still works.
